must_detect.matched_text:
Subject record (anchored): Mr. Qiu Liang (R&D Manager), Resident ID No. 37 08 2 5 1991 **** 3 2 1 X; employee id emp:qiul-iang-004; manager: Ms. Han Lixue.
Sensitive PI processed for employment and facility access: Mr. Qiu Liang’s biometric fingerprints and facial template for lab turnstiles; occupational health exam results (e.g., hepatic panel); a voluntary genetic-screening summary; self-declared religion (Daoist); and union membership (Yunzhou Tech Workers Union).
Minor information: his dependent Qiu Ze (age 12) listed for employer medical insurance; guardian consent documented by Ms. Han Lixue; tagged as sensitive minor PI per PIPL with heightened protection.
Sexual-orientation field: Mr. Qiu Liang self-identifies as gay for benefits administration; access strictly limited to HR with separate approval logs; processing based on clear, separate consent and necessity for employment benefits only.
MNPI segregation: as issuer, pre-disclosure revenue drafts, placement timetables, and board resolutions constitute inside information and are ring-fenced in an “insider room”; HR health/biometric fields are never used for trading or investor relations.
Benign product naming: Genetic Lantern and Biometric Shield are internal product modules and do not describe any person’s genetic or biometric characteristics.
Cross-border transfer: export of payroll-support data to Blue Harbor Analytics Pte. Ltd. (SG) is on hold pending municipal cyber authority filing YNZ-DS-2026-014 and execution of China SCCs; until approval, data is processed in CN-only zone Yunzhou IDC-03 with geo-fencing.
Retention schedule: biometric logs auto-delete after 180 days; health/religion/union/sexual-orientation fields are retained 10 years post-termination or longer if a legal hold applies; minor dependent records are removed when Qiu Ze turns 14 or coverage ends, whichever is earlier.
DSAR: submit via https://xinyi.example.cn/dsar?req=QIU-LIANG&u=socid_91%2A%2A%2A0Y9 or email privacy@xinyirobotics.cn; we verify using masked Resident ID and SMS to +86-13**-**7219; rights include access, copy, correction, deletion, and portability per PIPL.
Access control and audit: roles are separ a ted; HR can view health/union/sexual-orientation with dual control; Legal handles MNPI insider room; all actions logged, e.g., file://hr/records/2026/qi u l i a n g.pdf and SIEM event ql-2026-04-19.
This is not MNPI: public-source references (e.g., Yunzhou Daily press blurbs) and casual mentions of the Beiyun Mariners sports team are excluded from insider lists and trading windows.
lowercase proj mgmt: todo refresh rivergate policy and dei training; we do not collect any material nonpublic info for fan clubs; nothing here is a merger agreement or change‑of‑control commitment; metaphors like “the dragon wakes” in marketing copy are ignored by compliance.
